S.FORM: Nga'ay ho^ mapolong. Anini^ pasifana'en ako kamo a o maan han no Pangcah ko kakaenen.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ħo~uʔ mapo~uɾo~uŋ. aniniʔ pasifanaʡən ako~u kamo~u a o~u maan ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kakaənən.

S.TRANSL: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的阿美語怎麼說。
Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Ami language for food.

S.FORM: Mafana' kamo mitengil to sowal ako haw?
S.PHON: mafanaʡ kamo~u mitəŋiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ ako~u ħaw?
S.FORM: Mafana' kamo mitengil to sowal ako haw?
S.PHON: mafanaʡ kamo~u mitəŋiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ ako~u ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Do you understand what the teacher says?

S.FORM: Singsi^, caay ka fana' kako. Tiyolen haca ari?
S.PHON: siŋsiʔ, ʦaaj ka fanaʡ kako~u. tijo~uɾən ħaʦa ari?
S.FORM: Singsi^, caay ka fana' kako. Tiyolen haca ari?
S.PHON: siŋsiʔ, ʦaaj ka fanaʡ kako~u. tijo~uɾən ħaʦa ari?
S.TRANSL: 老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
I don't understand. Can you repeat it again?

S.FORM: Caay ka tengil, tata'aken ko ngiha' ari?
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka təŋiɾ, tataʡakən ko~u ŋiħaʡ ari?
S.FORM: Caay ka tengil, tata'aken ko ngiha' ari?
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka təŋiɾ, tataʡakən ko~u ŋiħaʡ ari?
S.TRANSL: 我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
I can't hear you, can you speak louder?

S.FORM: Nengnengen koni. Todongen kako a miasip.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən ko~uni. to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən kako~u a miasip.
S.FORM: Nengnengen koni. Todongen kako a miasip.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən ko~uni. to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən kako~u a miasip.
S.TRANSL: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
Look here, please! Repeat after me.

S.FORM: Hay, fangcal.
S.PHON: ħaj, faŋʦaɾ.
S.FORM: Hay, fangcal.
S.PHON: ħaj, faŋʦaɾ.

S.FORM: Asipen haca. Tata'angen ko ngiha'.
S.PHON: asipən ħaʦa. tataʡaŋən ko~u ŋiħaʡ.

S.TRANSL: Read it again. Please speak louder.

S.TRANSL: I forgot to bring my eraser.

S.FORM: Caliwen ko no tatihiay iso.

S.FORM: Hatini ko pinanam ita anini^.

S.TRANSL: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
Class dismissed, see you next week.

S.TRANSL: 你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你可以嗎?
Are you free this afternoon? I'd like to visit you, is that okay?

S.FORM: Nga'ay to. Talaen ako kiso i loma'.

S.TRANSL: 你明天有空嗎?我想請問你關於阿美族的傳說故事。
Are you free tomorrow? I would like to ask you about the legends of the Amis.

S.TRANSL: 明天我要去山上，不在家喔。
I'm going to the mountains tomorrow, so I won't be home.

S.FORM: O nikatengil ako, mataneng ko fana' iso to rayray no Pangcah, saka mangalay kako a mitengil i tisowanan.

S.TRANSL: 我聽說您對阿美族的傳統習俗非常了解，想要請教您一下。
I heard that you know a lot about the traditional customs of the Amis and I would like to ask you something.

I don't know much about it, but I will try to answer as best I can.

Yes. I used to go hunting in the mountains when I was young.

All that I say is true, the sayings of my ancestors.

S.FORM: Hatini aca^ ko pipalicay ako anini^. Aray!

S.FORM: Limaen aca^ li'an ari!
S.PHON: ɾimaən aʦaʔ ɾiʡan ari!
S.FORM: Limaen aca^ li'an ari!
S.PHON: ɾimaən aʦaʔ ɾiʡan ari!

S.FORM: Tadamatekes! Keroren ari?
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮamatəkəs! kəro~urən ari?
S.FORM: Tadamatekes! Keroren ari?
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮamatəkəs! kəro~urən ari?
S.TRANSL: 這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

S.FORM: Caay ka nga'ay! Ka^me:day to koni.
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj! kaʔmə:ɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~uni.
S.FORM: Caay ka nga'ay! Ka^me:day to koni.
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj! kaʔmə:ɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~uni.
S.TRANSL: 不行，這個已經很便宜了。
No, this is already very cheap.

S.FORM: Cakayen ako konini a piyang.
S.PHON: ʦakajən ako~u ko~unini a pijaŋ.
S.FORM: Cakayen ako konini a piyang.
S.PHON: ʦakajən ako~u ko~unini a pijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: I want this packet of cookies.

S.FORM: Tolo^ polo' pida^ kina piyang. Mangalay ho^ to roma^ haw?
S.PHON: to~uɾo~uʔ po~uɾo~uʡ piɬ~ɮaʔ kina pijaŋ. maŋaɾaj ħo~uʔ to~u ro~umaʔ ħaw?
S.FORM: Tolo^ polo' pida^ kina piyang. Mangalay ho^ to roma^ haw?
S.PHON: to~uɾo~uʔ po~uɾo~uʡ piɬ~ɮaʔ kina pijaŋ. maŋaɾaj ħo~uʔ to~u ro~umaʔ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
$30 for the cookies, anything else you need?

S.FORM: Manga'ay caliwen ako ko payso^ iso haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj ʦaɾiwən ako~u ko~u pajso~uʔ iso~u ħaw?
S.FORM: Manga'ay caliwen ako ko payso^ iso haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj ʦaɾiwən ako~u ko~u pajso~uʔ iso~u ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Can I borrow money from you?

S.FORM: Nga'ay to. Pina^ ko picaliw iso?
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u. pinaʔ ko~u piʦaɾiw iso~u?
S.FORM: Nga'ay to. Pina^ ko picaliw iso?
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u. pinaʔ ko~u piʦaɾiw iso~u?
S.TRANSL: Yes! How much do you need?

S.FORM: Matawal ako miala^ ko payso^. Caliwen ho^ ako ko payso^ iso haw!
S.PHON: matawaɾ ako~u miaɾaʔ ko~u pajso~uʔ. ʦaɾiwən ħo~uʔ ako~u ko~u pajso~uʔ iso~u ħaw!

S.TRANSL: 我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

S.FORM: Awaa:y ko niawitan ako to payso^.
S.PHON: awaa:j ko~u niawitan ako~u to~u pajso~uʔ.
S.FORM: Awaa:y ko niawitan ako to payso^.
S.PHON: awaa:j ko~u niawitan ako~u to~u pajso~uʔ.
S.TRANSL: I don't have any money either!

S.FORM: Mapawan kako mihakiwid to payso^. Caliwen ho^ ako ko payso^ iso haw!
S.PHON: mapawan kako~u miħakiwiɬ~ɮ to~u pajso~uʔ. ʦaɾiwən ħo~uʔ ako~u ko~u pajso~uʔ iso~u ħaw!

S.TRANSL: 我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

S.FORM: Na'ay. Caay ho panokas kiso toya nacila:ay.
S.PHON: naʡaj. ʦaaj ħo~u pano~ukas kiso~u to~uja naʦiɾa:aj.

S.TRANSL: 不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

S.FORM: Nga'ay caliwen ako ko fodoy iso haw?
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ʦaɾiwən ako~u ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj iso~u ħaw?

S.FORM: Nga'ay to. Lonok han.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u. ɾo~uno~uk ħan.
S.FORM: Nga'ay to. Lonok han.

S.FORM: Nga'ay caliwen ako ko codad iso haw?

S.FORM: Mapacaliw ako ci Panay.
S.PHON: mapaʦaɾiw ako~u ʦi panaj.
S.FORM: Mapacaliw ako ci Panay.
S.PHON: mapaʦaɾiw ako~u ʦi panaj.

S.FORM: Pacaliwen ho^ kako to koliciw iso haw?
S.PHON: paʦaɾiwən ħo~uʔ kako~u to~u ko~uɾiʦiw iso~u ħaw?
S.FORM: Pacaliwen ho^ kako to koliciw iso haw?
S.PHON: paʦaɾiwən ħo~uʔ kako~u to~u ko~uɾiʦiw iso~u ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

S.FORM: Nga'ay to. Panokasen anocila^.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u. pano~ukasən ano~uʦiɾaʔ.
S.FORM: Nga'ay to. Panokasen anocila^.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u. pano~ukasən ano~uʦiɾaʔ.
S.TRANSL: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

S.FORM: Ma'orad to. Awa^ ko cacelakan ako. Pacaliwen ho^ kako to cacelakan haw?
S.PHON: maʡo~uraɬ~ɮ to~u. awaʔ ko~u ʦaʦəɾakan ako~u. paʦaɾiwən ħo~uʔ kako~u to~u ʦaʦəɾakan ħaw?
S.FORM: Ma'orad to. Awa^ ko cacelakan ako. Pacaliwen ho^ kako to cacelakan haw?

S.TRANSL: 下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

S.FORM: Cecay ko cacelakan, makomod kita.
S.PHON: ʦəʦaj ko~u ʦaʦəɾakan, mako~umo~uɬ~ɮ kita.
S.FORM: Cecay ko cacelakan, makomod kita.
S.PHON: ʦəʦaj ko~u ʦaʦəɾakan, mako~umo~uɬ~ɮ kita.
S.TRANSL: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

S.FORM: Oya nipacaliwan iso i takowanan kina codad, panokasen ako i tisowanan.
S.PHON: o~uja nipaʦaɾiwan iso~u i tako~uwanan kina ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, pano~ukasən ako~u i tiso~uwanan.

S.TRANSL: 這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

S.FORM: Ano ira ko kacifaloco'an iso a miasip, pasowal hato kako.
S.PHON: ano~u ira ko~u kaʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡan iso~u a miasip, paso~uwaɾ ħato~u kako~u.

S.PHON: ano~u ira ko~u kaʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡan iso~u a miasip, paso~uwaɾ ħato~u kako~u.
S.TRANSL: 還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
You can tell me what else you want to read.

S.FORM: Anohacowa^ kako panokas tona payso^ i tisowanan?
S.PHON: ano~uħaʦo~uwaʔ kako~u pano~ukas to~una pajso~uʔ i tiso~uwanan?
S.FORM: Anohacowa^ kako panokas tona payso^ i tisowanan?
S.PHON: ano~uħaʦo~uwaʔ kako~u pano~ukas to~una pajso~uʔ i tiso~uwanan?
S.TRANSL: When do I have to pay you back?

S.FORM: Aka ka caroh, itiya hato cipayso^ kiso.
S.PHON: aka ka ʦaro~uħ, itija ħato~u ʦipajso~uʔ kiso~u.
S.FORM: Aka ka caroh, itiya hato cipayso^ kiso.
S.PHON: aka ka ʦaro~uħ, itija ħato~u ʦipajso~uʔ kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: 沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

S.FORM: Anohacowa^ kiso a panokas toya payso^ i takowanan?
S.PHON: ano~uħaʦo~uwaʔ kiso~u a pano~ukas to~uja pajso~uʔ i tako~uwanan?

S.FORM: Anocila^.
S.PHON: ano~uʦiɾaʔ.
S.FORM: Anocila^.
S.PHON: ano~uʦiɾaʔ.

S.FORM: Anohacowa^ kiso a panokas toya codad?

S.TRANSL: When are you going to return my book?

S.FORM: Mapanokas to ako inacila^ kiyami?
S.PHON: mapano~ukas to~u ako~u inaʦiɾaʔ kijami?
S.FORM: Mapanokas to ako inacila^ kiyami?

S.FORM: O nipacaliwan ni Kacaw i tisowanan kina impic hay?
S.PHON: o~u nipaʦaɾiwan ni kaʦaw i tiso~uwanan kina impiʦ ħaj?

S.FORM: Hay, o nicaliwan ako anini^ i ciiraan.
S.PHON: ħaj, o~u niʦaɾiwan ako~u aniniʔ i ʦiiraan.
S.FORM: Hay, o nicaliwan ako anini^ i ciiraan.

S.FORM: O nicaliwan iso ci Kacawan kina impic hay?
S.PHON: o~u niʦaɾiwan iso~u ʦi kaʦawan kina impiʦ ħaj?

S.TRANSL: Did you borrow this pen from Kacaw?

S.FORM: Caay, o nicakayan ni ina^.

S.FORM: Caay, o nicakayan ni ina^.
S.PHON: ʦaaj, o~u niʦakajan ni inaʔ.

S.FORM: Awaay to ko cilah, oli caliwen ho i ci Panayan.

S.FORM: Hay, tayra kako.

S.FORM: Mimaan kiso?

S.FORM: Tada adihay kina semot, mifariw kako. Pananomen ako anohoni.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa aɬ~ɮiħaj kina səmo~ut, mifariw kako~u. panano~umən ako~u ano~uħo~uni.

S.FORM: Pataynien ho^ koya kawkaw ato pitaw.

S.FORM: Matafi^ to ako i honi^.

S.FORM: Manga'ay to litoden koya nipalomaan iso hay?

S.TRANSL: 這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的昭和草就還不能收成。

S.FORM: Wata:h ka adihay ko nifongaan iso!

Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

S.FORM: Damaen kako a patala'ariri^ haw?

S.FORM: Pacingen ako!
S.PHON: paʦiŋən ako~u!

S.FORM: Mafana' kiso a mipana' a mi'adop hay?

S.PHON: mafanaʡ kiso~u a mipanaʡ a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up ħaj?
S.TRANSL: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

S.FORM: Talakalen ako ko pi'adop, tomatira ciwaco^ kako a cikowang a mi'adop.
S.PHON: taɾakaɾən ako~u ko~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up, to~umatira ʦiwaʦo~uʔ kako~u a ʦiko~uwaŋ a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up.
S.FORM: Talakalen ako ko pi'adop, tomatira ciwaco^ kako a cikowang a mi'adop.

S.TRANSL: 我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

S.FORM: O wahkad no fafoy no lotok kinian.
S.PHON: o~u waħkaɬ~ɮ no~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk kinian.

S.PHON: o~u waħkaɬ~ɮ no~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk kinian.
S.TRANSL: This is the road the boar took.

S.FORM: Pakicowa^ kiso a mafana'?
S.PHON: pakiʦo~uwaʔ kiso~u a mafanaʡ?
S.FORM: Pakicowa^ kiso a mafana'?
S.PHON: pakiʦo~uwaʔ kiso~u a mafanaʡ?

S.FORM: O naripa'an no fafoy kinian, saka o kamakatan no fafoy kinian.
S.PHON: o~u naripaʡan no~u fafo~uj kinian, saka o~u kamakatan no~u fafo~uj kinian.
S.FORM: O naripa'an no fafoy kinian, saka o kamakatan no fafoy kinian.
S.PHON: o~u naripaʡan no~u fafo~uj kinian, saka o~u kamakatan no~u fafo~uj kinian.
S.TRANSL: 這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

S.FORM: Katahenay a milido^, mato iraay ko maalaay.
S.PHON: kataħənaj a miɾiɬ~ɮo~uʔ, mato~u iraaj ko~u maaɾaaj.

S.PHON: kataħənaj a miɾiɬ~ɮo~uʔ, mato~u iraaj ko~u maaɾaaj.
S.TRANSL: 快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

S.FORM: Nawiro mafana' kiso?
S.PHON: nawiro~u mafanaʡ kiso~u?
S.FORM: Nawiro mafana' kiso?

S.FORM: Masanek no waco^ ko eloh no fafoy. Tata tayra kita minengneng.
S.PHON: masanək no~u waʦo~uʔ ko~u əɾo~uħ no~u fafo~uj. tata tajra kita minəŋnəŋ.

S.PHON: masanək no~u waʦo~uʔ ko~u əɾo~uħ no~u fafo~uj. tata tajra kita minəŋnəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
The dog seems to have smelled it. Let's follow them.

S.FORM: O maan kora nisanga'an iso?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~ura nisaŋaʡan iso~u?
S.FORM: O maan kora nisanga'an iso?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~ura nisaŋaʡan iso~u?
S.TRANSL: 你正在製作的是什麼東西?

S.FORM: O sapenec kinian, o sapilepel to 'edo^.
S.PHON: o~u sapənəʦ kinian, o~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~uʔ.

S.TRANSL: 這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

S.FORM: Ｏ maan kora nitelian iso itiraw?
S.PHON: * maan ko~ura nitəɾian iso~u itiraw?

S.PHON: * maan ko~ura nitəɾian iso~u itiraw?
S.TRANSL: 你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
What is that thing you put there?

S.FORM: Ｏ tilo^ to sakiwa'ay, o sapilepel to mangcel.
S.PHON: * tiɾo~uʔ to~u sakiwaʡaj, o~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u maŋʦəɾ.

S.TRANSL: 那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

S.FORM: Miaray to palemeday, adihay ko tama' ita anini^.

S.TRANSL: 感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

S.FORM: Hay, pataloma'en ita i niyaro' a pafatis.

S.PHON: pakaʦinamaɾaj iri pakaħiko~ukiʔ kiso~u a taɾapo~uso~uŋ?
S.TRANSL: 你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

S.FORM: Pakahikoki^ kako, kitahenayan no hikoki^ ko cinamalay.
S.PHON: pakaħiko~ukiʔ kako~u, kitaħənajan no~u ħiko~ukiʔ ko~u ʦinamaɾaj.
S.FORM: Pakahikoki^ kako, kitahenayan no hikoki^ ko cinamalay.
S.PHON: pakaħiko~ukiʔ kako~u, kitaħənajan no~u ħiko~ukiʔ ko~u ʦinamaɾaj.
S.TRANSL: 我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

S.FORM: Pakafaso^ iri pakapaliding kiso a talakiwkay?
S.PHON: pakafaso~uʔ iri pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋ kiso~u a taɾakiwkaj?
S.FORM: Pakafaso^ iri pakapaliding kiso a talakiwkay?
S.PHON: pakafaso~uʔ iri pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋ kiso~u a taɾakiwkaj?
S.TRANSL: 你去教會搭公車還是開車?
Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

S.FORM: Pakapaliding kako, kitahenayan no paliding ko faso^.
S.PHON: pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋ kako~u, kitaħənajan no~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ ko~u faso~uʔ.
S.FORM: Pakapaliding kako, kitahenayan no paliding ko faso^.
S.PHON: pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋ kako~u, kitaħənajan no~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ ko~u faso~uʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

S.FORM: Maraay ko patiyamay nani loma' namo hay?
S.PHON: maraaj ko~u patijamaj nani ɾo~umaʡ namo~u ħaj?
S.FORM: Maraay ko patiyamay nani loma' namo hay?
S.PHON: maraaj ko~u patijamaj nani ɾo~umaʡ namo~u ħaj?
S.TRANSL: Is the market close to your house?

S.FORM: Caay ka ngata^, paka-u-tu-fay kako a talapatiyamay.
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka ŋataʔ, paka-u-tu-faj kako~u a taɾapatijamaj.
S.FORM: Caay ka ngata^, pakaotofay kako a talapatiyamay.
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka ŋataʔ, paka-o~u-to~u-faj kako~u a taɾapatijamaj.
S.TRANSL: 不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

S.FORM: Manga:ta^ ko yo-fing nani picodadan hay?
S.PHON: maŋa:taʔ ko~u jo~u-fiŋ nani piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan ħaj?
S.FORM: Manga:ta^ ko yofing nani picodadan hay?
S.PHON: maŋa:taʔ ko~u jo~u-fiŋ nani piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan ħaj?
S.TRANSL: Is the post office close to the school?

S.FORM: Manga:ta^, rakat han i, tangasa^ to.
S.PHON: maŋa:taʔ, rakat ħan i, taŋasaʔ to~u.
S.FORM: Manga:ta^, rakat han i, tangasa^ to.
S.PHON: maŋa:taʔ, rakat ħan i, taŋasaʔ to~u.
S.TRANSL: Yes, it is within walking distance.

S.FORM: Manga:ta^ ko kamaenan nani cya-taw hay?
S.PHON: maŋa:taʔ ko~u kamaənan nani ʦja-taw ħaj?
S.FORM: Manga:ta^ ko kamaenan nani cyataw hay?
S.PHON: maŋa:taʔ ko~u kamaənan nani ʦja-taw ħaj?
S.TRANSL: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.

S.FORM: Nani cya-taw, lima^ seli' no tatokian i, tangasa^ to.
S.PHON: nani ʦja-taw, ɾimaʔ səɾiʡ no~u tato~ukian i, taŋasaʔ to~u.
S.FORM: Nani cyataw, lima^ seli' no tatokian i, tangasa^ to.
S.PHON: nani ʦja-taw, ɾimaʔ səɾiʡ no~u tato~ukian i, taŋasaʔ to~u.
S.TRANSL: 出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.

S.FORM: Cilimaw kiso anini^ haw?
S.PHON: ʦiɾimaw kiso~u aniniʔ ħaw?
S.FORM: Cilimaw kiso anini^ haw?
S.PHON: ʦiɾimaw kiso~u aniniʔ ħaw?

S.FORM: O maan ko demak?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.FORM: O maan ko demak?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak?

S.FORM: Mangalay kako a miliso' i tisowanan.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj kako~u a miɾiso~uʡ i tiso~uwanan.
S.FORM: Mangalay kako a miliso' i tisowanan.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj kako~u a miɾiso~uʡ i tiso~uwanan.
S.TRANSL: I would like to visit you.

S.FORM: Awaay kako i loma', cidemak kako. Cilaen to ri.
S.PHON: awaaj kako~u i ɾo~umaʡ, ʦiɬ~ɮəmak kako~u. ʦiɾaən to~u ri.
S.FORM: Awaay kako i loma', cidemak kako. Cilaen to ri.
S.PHON: awaaj kako~u i ɾo~umaʡ, ʦiɬ~ɮəmak kako~u. ʦiɾaən to~u ri.
S.TRANSL: 我今天有事不在家。改天吧。
I am out today. How about another day?

S.FORM: Cilimaw kiso anocila^ haw? Tayra kako i tisowanan i herek no lahok.
S.PHON: ʦiɾimaw kiso~u ano~uʦiɾaʔ ħaw? tajra kako~u i tiso~uwanan i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk.
S.FORM: Cilimaw kiso anocila^ haw? Tayra kako i tisowanan i herek no lahok.
S.PHON: ʦiɾimaw kiso~u ano~uʦiɾaʔ ħaw? tajra kako~u i tiso~uwanan i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk.
S.TRANSL: 那你明天有空嗎?我下午去找你。
Then, are you available tomorrow? I'll visit you tomorrow afternoon.

S.FORM: Nga'ay to, talaen ako kiso i loma'.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u, taɾaən ako~u kiso~u i ɾo~umaʡ.
S.FORM: Nga'ay to, talaen ako kiso i loma'.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u, taɾaən ako~u kiso~u i ɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: Sure, I will wait for you at home.

S.FORM: Manga'ay kako a milu-ko-ong haw? Mangalay kako a mikilok.
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj kako~u a miɾu-ko~u-o~uŋ ħaw? maŋaɾaj kako~u a mikiɾo~uk.
S.FORM: Manga'ay kako a milokoong haw? Mangalay kako a mikilok.
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj kako~u a miɾo~u-ko~u-o~uŋ ħaw? maŋaɾaj kako~u a mikiɾo~uk.
S.TRANSL: 請問我可以錄音嗎?我想做紀錄。
Would you mind if I do the voice recording? I would like to keep a record.

S.FORM: Manga'ay to! Mamaan!
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj to~u! mamaan!
S.FORM: Manga'ay to! Mamaan!
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj to~u! mamaan!

S.FORM: Manga'ay kako a mi-lu-ing haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj kako~u a mi-ɾu-iŋ ħaw?
S.FORM: Manga'ay kako a miloing haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj kako~u a mi-ɾo~u-iŋ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Would you mind if I do the video recording?

S.FORM: Caay ka salongan kako, caay haca^ ka solimet ko pa'aririan, hamaanen ri!
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka saɾo~uŋan kako~u, ʦaaj ħaʦaʔ ka so~uɾimət ko~u paʡaririan, ħamaanən ri!
S.FORM: Caay ka salongan kako, caay haca^ ka solimet ko pa'aririan, hamaanen ri!
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka saɾo~uŋan kako~u, ʦaaj ħaʦaʔ ka so~uɾimət ko~u paʡaririan, ħamaanən ri!
S.TRANSL: 我不好看，倉庫也沒整理，不要啦!
No, I am plain and the warehouse hasn't been tidied up yet.

S.FORM: Ano matira, sya-sing hato aca^ ako.
S.PHON: ano~u matira, sja-siŋ ħato~u aʦaʔ ako~u.
S.FORM: Ano matira, syasing hato aca^ ako.
S.PHON: ano~u matira, sja-siŋ ħato~u aʦaʔ ako~u.
S.TRANSL: Then I will just take photos.

S.FORM: Akaa pi-sya-sing.
S.PHON: akaa pi-sja-siŋ.
S.FORM: Akaa pisyasing.
S.PHON: akaa pi-sja-siŋ.

S.FORM: Aray ko pihayda iso i takowanan a miliso'.
S.PHON: araj ko~u piħajɬ~ɮa iso~u i tako~uwanan a miɾiso~uʡ.
S.FORM: Aray ko pihayda iso i takowanan a miliso'.
S.PHON: araj ko~u piħajɬ~ɮa iso~u i tako~uwanan a miɾiso~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Thank you for accepting the interview.

S.FORM: Nga'ay to! O maan ko lalicayen iso?
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u! o~u maan ko~u ɾaɾiʦajən iso~u?
S.FORM: Nga'ay to! O maan ko lalicayen iso?
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u! o~u maan ko~u ɾaɾiʦajən iso~u?
S.TRANSL: You are welcome. What would you like to know?

S.FORM: O maan ko tayal iso yo o limecedan ho^ kiso?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u tajaɾ iso~u jo~u o~u ɾiməʦəɬ~ɮan ħo~uʔ kiso~u?
S.FORM: O maan ko tayal iso yo o limecedan ho^ kiso?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u tajaɾ iso~u jo~u o~u ɾiməʦəɬ~ɮan ħo~uʔ kiso~u?
S.TRANSL: 請問您年輕時是做什麼的？
What do you do when you are young?

S.FORM: O tayring i 'ayaw, nika misawad to kako a matayal.
S.PHON: o~u tajriŋ i ʡajaw, nika misawaɬ~ɮ to~u kako~u a matajaɾ.
S.FORM: O tayring i 'ayaw, nika misawad to kako a matayal.
S.PHON: o~u tajriŋ i ʡajaw, nika misawaɬ~ɮ to~u kako~u a matajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 我以前是警察，但我現在退休了。
I was a police officer but I am retired now.

S.FORM: Matayal ho^ kiso imatini haw?
S.PHON: matajaɾ ħo~uʔ kiso~u imatini ħaw?
S.FORM: Matayal ho^ kiso imatini haw?
S.PHON: matajaɾ ħo~uʔ kiso~u imatini ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Then, are you working at the moment?

S.FORM: I picodadan kako a matayal.
S.PHON: i piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan kako~u a matajaɾ.
S.FORM: I picodadan kako a matayal.
S.PHON: i piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan kako~u a matajaɾ.

S.FORM: Milicay haca^ kako, i niyaro' ko wawa^ no miso a maro' haw?
S.PHON: miɾiʦaj ħaʦaʔ kako~u, i nijaro~uʡ ko~u wawaʔ no~u miso~u a maro~uʡ ħaw?
S.FORM: Milicay haca^ kako, i niyaro' ko wawa^ no miso a maro' haw?
S.PHON: miɾiʦaj ħaʦaʔ kako~u, i nijaro~uʡ ko~u wawaʔ no~u miso~u a maro~uʡ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 請問您的孩子也住在部落嗎?
Do your kids live in the tribe too?

S.FORM: Caay, i to-kay a maemin ko wawa^ ako a ma'orip.
S.PHON: ʦaaj, i to~u-kaj a maəmin ko~u wawaʔ ako~u a maʡo~urip.
S.FORM: Caay, i tokay a maemin ko wawa^ ako a ma'orip.
S.PHON: ʦaaj, i to~u-kaj a maəmin ko~u wawaʔ ako~u a maʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: 不，我的孩子在都市生活。
No, my kids are all living in the city.

S.FORM: Ca:cay kiso a maro' haw?
S.PHON: ʦa:ʦaj kiso~u a maro~uʡ ħaw?
S.FORM: Ca:cay kiso a maro' haw?
S.PHON: ʦa:ʦaj kiso~u a maro~uʡ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Then, do you live by yourself?

S.FORM: Ciwaco^ ato ci'ayam kako. O malo paro^ no loma' ako caira.
S.PHON: ʦiwaʦo~uʔ ato~u ʦiʡajam kako~u. o~u maɾo~u paro~uʔ no~u ɾo~umaʡ ako~u ʦaira.
S.FORM: Ciwaco^ ato ci'ayam kako. O malo paro^ no loma' ako caira.
S.PHON: ʦiwaʦo~uʔ ato~u ʦiʡajam kako~u. o~u maɾo~u paro~uʔ no~u ɾo~umaʡ ako~u ʦaira.
S.TRANSL: 我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

S.FORM: Ciposi:^ kako, ira caira saka caay ka araaw.
S.PHON: ʦipo~usi:ʔ kako~u, ira ʦaira saka ʦaaj ka araaw.
S.FORM: Ciposi:^ kako, ira caira saka caay ka araaw.
S.PHON: ʦipo~usi:ʔ kako~u, ira ʦaira saka ʦaaj ka araaw.
S.TRANSL: 我也有養一隻貓，有動物陪伴不會無聊。
I have a cat too. I won't get bored with the company of my pet.

S.FORM: Mangalay kako a mitengil to pakayniay i paysin no pi'adop a demak.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj kako~u a mitəŋiɾ to~u pakajniaj i pajsin no~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.FORM: Mangalay kako a mitengil to pakayniay i paysin no pi'adop a demak.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj kako~u a mitəŋiɾ to~u pakajniaj i pajsin no~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: 我想請問你關於打獵的禁忌。
I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

S.FORM: Caay ka adihay ko nikafana' ako to pi'adop, nika ano o kafana'an ako i, ca'ofen ako kiso.
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nikafanaʡ ako~u to~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up, nika ano~u o~u kafanaʡan ako~u i, ʦaʡo~ufən ako~u kiso~u.
S.FORM: Caay ka adihay ko nikafana' ako to pi'adop, nika ano o kafana'an ako i, ca'ofen ako kiso.
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nikafanaʡ ako~u to~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up, nika ano~u o~u kafanaʡan ako~u i, ʦaʡo~ufən ako~u kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: 我知道的不多，但我能回答的都會回答你。
I don't know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

S.FORM: Ira ko paysin a demak to pakayniay i sapi'adop a lalosidan haw?
S.PHON: ira ko~u pajsin a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u pakajniaj i sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan ħaw?
S.FORM: Ira ko paysin a demak to pakayniay i sapi'adop a lalosidan haw?
S.PHON: ira ko~u pajsin a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u pakajniaj i sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 你們打獵的武器有什麼禁忌嗎?
Do you have any taboos about hunting weapons?

S.FORM: O sapi'adop a lalosidan i, caay papitefing i tamiyanan o fafahiyan.
S.PHON: o~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan i, ʦaaj papitəfiŋ i tamijanan o~u fafaħijan.
S.FORM: O sapi'adop a lalosidan i, caay papitefing i tamiyanan o fafahiyan.
S.PHON: o~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan i, ʦaaj papitəfiŋ i tamijanan o~u fafaħijan.
S.TRANSL: 我們打獵的武器不可以讓女生碰到。
Our hunting weapons are untouchable to women.

S.FORM: Manga'ay a mihakelong ko fafahiyan a mi'adop haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj a miħakəɾo~uŋ ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up ħaw?
S.FORM: Manga'ay a mihakelong ko fafahiyan a mi'adop haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj a miħakəɾo~uŋ ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 那女人可以一起去打獵嗎?
Then, can women go hunting together?

S.FORM: Caay, caay ka nga'ay ko fafahiyan a mi'adop.
S.PHON: ʦaaj, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up.
S.FORM: Caay, caay ka nga'ay ko fafahiyan a mi'adop.
S.PHON: ʦaaj, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up.
S.TRANSL: 不行，女人也不可以打獵。
No, women cannot go hunting either.

S.FORM: Anini^ a romi'ad, pasifana'en no mako kamo, o maan han no Pangcah ko 'a'adopen.
S.PHON: aniniʔ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡən no~u mako~u kamo~u, o~u maan ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən.
S.FORM: Anini^ a romi'ad, pasifana'en no mako kamo, o maan han no Pangcah ko 'a'adopen.
S.PHON: aniniʔ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡən no~u mako~u kamo~u, o~u maan ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən.
S.TRANSL: 今天老師要教大家動物的阿美語怎麼說。
I will teach everyone all kinds of animals in Pangcah language today.

S.FORM: Anini^ a romi'ad, pasifana'en no mako kamo, o maan han no Pangcah ko kalopinaloma^.
S.PHON: aniniʔ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡən no~u mako~u kamo~u, o~u maan ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kaɾo~upinaɾo~umaʔ.
S.FORM: Anini^ a romi'ad, pasifana'en no mako kamo, o maan han no Pangcah ko kalopinaloma^.
S.PHON: aniniʔ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡən no~u mako~u kamo~u, o~u maan ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kaɾo~upinaɾo~umaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 今天老師要教大家植物的阿美語怎麼說。
I will teach everyone all kinds of plants in Pangcah language today.

S.FORM: Anini^ a romi'ad, pasifana'en no mako kamo, o maan han no Pangcah ko heci^ no losay.
S.PHON: aniniʔ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡən no~u mako~u kamo~u, o~u maan ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u ħəʦiʔ no~u ɾo~usaj.
S.FORM: Anini^ a romi'ad, pasifana'en no mako kamo, o maan han no Pangcah ko heci^ no losay.
S.PHON: aniniʔ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡən no~u mako~u kamo~u, o~u maan ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u ħəʦiʔ no~u ɾo~usaj.
S.TRANSL: 今天老師要教大家水果的阿美語怎麼說。
I will teach everyone all kinds of fruits in Pangcah language today.

S.FORM: Aka ka foti'.
S.PHON: aka ka fo~utiʡ.
S.FORM: Aka ka foti'.
S.PHON: aka ka fo~utiʡ.

S.FORM: Aka ka cinglaw.
S.PHON: aka ka ʦiŋɾaw.
S.FORM: Aka ka cinglaw.
S.PHON: aka ka ʦiŋɾaw.

S.FORM: Aka ho^ ka komaen to kakaenen.
S.PHON: aka ħo~uʔ ka ko~umaən to~u kakaənən.
S.FORM: Aka ho^ ka komaen to kakaenen.
S.PHON: aka ħo~uʔ ka ko~umaən to~u kakaənən.

S.FORM: Sadaken ko codad no miso.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮakən ko~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u miso~u.
S.FORM: Sadaken ko codad no miso.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮakən ko~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u miso~u.

S.FORM: Sadaken ko impic no miso.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮakən ko~u impiʦ no~u miso~u.
S.FORM: Sadaken ko impic no miso.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮakən ko~u impiʦ no~u miso~u.

S.FORM: Sadaken ko cacodaden no miso.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮakən ko~u ʦaʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮən no~u miso~u.
S.FORM: Sadaken ko cacodaden no miso.

S.FORM: Ci Panay aci Api' kami. Fohaten ho^ ko fawahan!
S.PHON: ʦi panaj aʦi apiʡ kami. fo~uħatən ħo~uʔ ko~u fawaħan!

S.PHON: ʦi panaj aʦi apiʡ kami. fo~uħatən ħo~uʔ ko~u fawaħan!
S.TRANSL: Grandma, we are Panay and Api', please open the door for us.

S.FORM: Cima^ i?
S.PHON: ʦimaʔ i?
S.FORM: Cima^ i?
S.PHON: ʦimaʔ i?

S.FORM: Ci Fuya^ kako, mikilimay kako ci Okayan.
S.PHON: ʦi fujaʔ kako~u, mikiɾimaj kako~u ʦi o~ukajan.
S.FORM: Ci Foya^ kako, mikilimay kako ci Okayan.
S.PHON: ʦi fo~ujaʔ kako~u, mikiɾimaj kako~u ʦi o~ukajan.
S.TRANSL: I am Fuya^, I am here for Okay.

S.FORM: Ina^, tayni kako a miliso' i tosowanan.
S.PHON: inaʔ, tajni kako~u a miɾiso~uʡ i to~uso~uwanan.

S.PHON: inaʔ, tajni kako~u a miɾiso~uʡ i to~uso~uwanan.
S.TRANSL: Grandma, I am here to see you.

S.FORM: Hala:fin to kiso caay ka tayni, mao:ron kako i tisowanan.
S.PHON: ħaɾa:fin to~u kiso~u ʦaaj ka tajni, mao~u:ro~un kako~u i tiso~uwanan.

S.TRANSL: 你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
You haven't been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

S.FORM: Api', tayni kako a misalama^.
S.PHON: apiʡ, tajni kako~u a misaɾamaʔ.
S.FORM: Api', tayni kako a misalama^.
S.PHON: apiʡ, tajni kako~u a misaɾamaʔ.
S.TRANSL: Api, I am here to play with you.

S.FORM: Ati, picomodi! Tatala^ sa kako.
S.PHON: ati, piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮi! tataɾaʔ sa kako~u.
S.FORM: Ati, picomodi! Tatala^ sa kako.
S.PHON: ati, piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮi! tataɾaʔ sa kako~u.
S.TRANSL: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

S.FORM: O nipalomaan ako kina fonga^, tanamen a komaen ari!
S.PHON: o~u nipaɾo~umaan ako~u kina fo~uŋaʔ, tanamən a ko~umaən ari!

S.TRANSL: 這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

S.FORM: Coperas kina fonga^.
S.PHON: ʦo~upəras kina fo~uŋaʔ.
S.FORM: Coperas kina fonga^.
S.PHON: ʦo~upəras kina fo~uŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: The sweet potato is so sweet.

S.FORM: Ati Ati! O nipalomaan ako kina heci^ no losay, tanamen a komaen ari.
S.PHON: ati ati! o~u nipaɾo~umaan ako~u kina ħəʦiʔ no~u ɾo~usaj, tanamən a ko~umaən ari.

S.TRANSL: 過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

S.FORM: Macedem kina heci^ no losay.

S.FORM: Kamaro! O nipalomaan ako kina awaayay ko iyo^ a 'ariray, tanamen a komaen ari!
S.PHON: kamaro~u! o~u nipaɾo~umaan ako~u kina awaajaj ko~u ijo~uʔ a ʡariraj, tanamən a ko~umaən ari!

S.TRANSL: 請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

S.FORM: Hay! Macedem kina 'ariray.
S.PHON: ħaj! maʦəɬ~ɮəm kina ʡariraj.
S.FORM: Hay! Macedem kina 'ariray.
S.PHON: ħaj! maʦəɬ~ɮəm kina ʡariraj.
S.TRANSL: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

S.FORM: Mangalay kiso to mami^ haw?

S.FORM: Caay ka maen kako to mami^, o ling-ko^ aca^ ko kaenen ako.

I can't eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

S.FORM: Mangalay kiso to piyang haw?

S.FORM: Hay, maolah kako.
S.PHON: ħaj, mao~uɾaħ kako~u.
S.FORM: Hay, maolah kako.
S.PHON: ħaj, mao~uɾaħ kako~u.
S.TRANSL: Sure, I like it very much.

S.FORM: Podacen ako ko heci^ no losay, o kakaenen iso.
S.PHON: po~uɬ~ɮaʦən ako~u ko~u ħəʦiʔ no~u ɾo~usaj, o~u kakaənən iso~u.

S.FORM: Aray! Adihay ko salang nina heci^ no losay.

S.FORM: Alaen ako ko nanom, o nananomen iso.

S.FORM: Aray!

S.FORM: Adihayen kamaen, adihay ko nisafelan ako a sinafel.

S.FORM: Hay haw! Fangsis ri kaeso' ko kaen ako.

S.FORM: Adihayen kamaen, adihay ho^ ini.

S.FORM: Adihay to ko nikaenan ako, na'ay to.

S.FORM: Keriden ako kamo a talalotok anini^ a romi'ad.

S.TRANSL: 耶! 哇! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。

S.TRANSL: Kacaw's coat is the same as yours.

S.FORM: O kohetingay ko niira, caay ka lecad ko cengel no niyam.
S.PHON: o~u ko~uħətiŋaj ko~u niira, ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəŋəɾ no~u nijam.
S.FORM: O kohetingay ko niira, caay ka lecad ko cengel no niyam.
S.PHON: o~u ko~uħətiŋaj ko~u niira, ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəŋəɾ no~u nijam.
S.TRANSL: 他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
His coat is black, so our colors are different.

S.FORM: Panay, na micaliw kiso to payso^ i ci Kacawan haw?
S.PHON: panaj, na miʦaɾiw kiso~u to~u pajso~uʔ i ʦi kaʦawan ħaw?
S.FORM: Panay, na micaliw kiso to payso^ i ci Kacawan haw?
S.PHON: panaj, na miʦaɾiw kiso~u to~u pajso~uʔ i ʦi kaʦawan ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Panay, did you borrow money from Kacaw?

S.FORM: Hay, kona anini^ kako a panokas i ciiraan, nika mapawan kako a miala^ to payso^.
S.PHON: ħaj, ko~una aniniʔ kako~u a pano~ukas i ʦiiraan, nika mapawan kako~u a miaɾaʔ to~u pajso~uʔ.
S.FORM: Hay, kona anini^ kako a panokas i ciiraan, nika mapawan kako a miala^ to payso^.
S.PHON: ħaj, ko~una aniniʔ kako~u a pano~ukas i ʦiiraan, nika mapawan kako~u a miaɾaʔ to~u pajso~uʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

S.FORM: Anohacowa^ to aca^ kiso a panokas?
S.PHON: ano~uħaʦo~uwaʔ to~u aʦaʔ kiso~u a pano~ukas?
S.FORM: Anohacowa^ to aca^ kiso a panokas?
S.PHON: ano~uħaʦo~uwaʔ to~u aʦaʔ kiso~u a pano~ukas?
S.TRANSL: Then, when will you return the money?

S.FORM: Panokas hato ako i ciiraan anocila^.
S.PHON: pano~ukas ħato~u ako~u i ʦiiraan ano~uʦiɾaʔ.
S.FORM: Panokas hato ako i ciiraan anocila^.
S.PHON: pano~ukas ħato~u ako~u i ʦiiraan ano~uʦiɾaʔ.
S.TRANSL: I will return to him tomorrow.

S.FORM: Hay, pasowal hato ako ci Kacaw.
S.PHON: ħaj, paso~uwaɾ ħato~u ako~u ʦi kaʦaw.
S.FORM: Hay, pasowal hato ako ci Kacaw.
S.PHON: ħaj, paso~uwaɾ ħato~u ako~u ʦi kaʦaw.
S.TRANSL: Okay, I will tell Kacaw for you.

S.FORM: O ta'eref ko sapilepel to 'edo^, o talakal ko sapilepel to tolok, matira ta matama^.
S.PHON: o~u taʡərəf ko~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~uʔ, o~u taɾakaɾ ko~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u to~uɾo~uk, matira ta matamaʔ.
S.FORM: O ta'eref ko sapilepel to 'edo^, o talakal ko sapilepel to tolok, matira ta matama^.
S.PHON: o~u taʡərəf ko~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~uʔ, o~u taɾakaɾ ko~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u to~uɾo~uk, matira ta matamaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

S.FORM: Hilam haenen aca^! Moraraw ko no mako! Onini ko sakacaay pakalepel no mako.
S.PHON: ħiɾam ħaənən aʦaʔ! mo~uraraw ko~u no~u mako~u! o~unini ko~u sakaʦaaj pakaɾəpəɾ no~u mako~u.
S.FORM: Hilam haenen aca^! Moraraw ko no mako! Onini ko sakacaay pakalepel no mako.
S.PHON: ħiɾam ħaənən aʦaʔ! mo~uraraw ko~u no~u mako~u! o~unini ko~u sakaʦaaj pakaɾəpəɾ no~u mako~u.
S.TRANSL: 原來是這樣！我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
No wonder! I am mistaken and that's why I cannot catch any of them.

S.FORM: Pasifana'aw haca^ ako kiso a misanga' to matiniay a tosa^ a tilo^.
S.PHON: pasifanaʡaw ħaʦaʔ ako~u kiso~u a misaŋaʡ to~u matiniaj a to~usaʔ a tiɾo~uʔ.
S.FORM: Pasifana'aw haca^ ako kiso a misanga' to matiniay a tosa^ a tilo^.
S.PHON: pasifanaʡaw ħaʦaʔ ako~u kiso~u a misaŋaʡ to~u matiniaj a to~usaʔ a tiɾo~uʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

S.FORM: Hay, aray! Matira i, mamanga'ay to kako a milepel to 'a'adopen.
S.PHON: ħaj, araj! matira i, mamaŋaʡaj to~u kako~u a miɾəpəɾ to~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən.
S.FORM: Hay, aray! Matira i, mamanga'ay to kako a milepel to 'a'adopen.
S.PHON: ħaj, araj! matira i, mamaŋaʡaj to~u kako~u a miɾəpəɾ to~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən.
S.TRANSL: 好啊，太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

S.FORM: Takaraw to ko semot no omah, Oli! Alaen ho^ ko kawkaw i 'ariri^, talaomah kita.
S.PHON: takaraw to~u ko~u səmo~ut no~u o~umaħ, o~uɾi! aɾaən ħo~uʔ ko~u kawkaw i ʡaririʔ, taɾao~umaħ kita.
S.FORM: Takaraw to ko semot no omah, Oli! Alaen ho^ ko kawkaw i 'ariri^, talaomah kita.
S.PHON: takaraw to~u ko~u səmo~ut no~u o~umaħ, o~uɾi! aɾaən ħo~uʔ ko~u kawkaw i ʡaririʔ, taɾao~umaħ kita.
S.TRANSL: 田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let's go to the fields.

S.FORM: Icowa^ a mateli^ koya kawkaw?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaʔ a matəɾiʔ ko~uja kawkaw?
S.FORM: Icowa^ a mateli^ koya kawkaw?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaʔ a matəɾiʔ ko~uja kawkaw?

S.FORM: I tatihi^ no fasolan, micomod kiso to 'ariri^ i, mamaneneng iso.
S.PHON: i tatiħiʔ no~u faso~uɾan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ kiso~u to~u ʡaririʔ i, mamanənəŋ iso~u.
S.FORM: I tatihi^ no fasolan, micomod kiso to 'ariri^ i, mamaneneng iso.
S.PHON: i tatiħiʔ no~u faso~uɾan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ kiso~u to~u ʡaririʔ i, mamanənəŋ iso~u.
S.TRANSL: 在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

S.FORM: Na'onen, matafala. Matalem kora kawkaw.
S.PHON: naʡo~unən, matafaɾa. mataɾəm ko~ura kawkaw.
S.FORM: Na'onen, matafala. Matalem kora kawkaw.
S.PHON: naʡo~unən, matafaɾa. mataɾəm ko~ura kawkaw.
S.TRANSL: 小心拿，不要受傷。鐮刀很利。
Be careful and don't get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

S.FORM: Aka piripa' to tilo^ ako yo!
S.PHON: aka piripaʡ to~u tiɾo~uʔ ako~u jo~u!
S.FORM: Aka piripa' to tilo^ ako yo!
S.PHON: aka piripaʡ to~u tiɾo~uʔ ako~u jo~u!

S.FORM: Icowa^ koya tilo^ no miso?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaʔ ko~uja tiɾo~uʔ no~u miso~u?
S.FORM: Icowa^ koya tilo^ no miso?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaʔ ko~uja tiɾo~uʔ no~u miso~u?

S.FORM: I kalaeno^ nora kilang ko tilo^ no mako.
S.PHON: i kaɾaəno~uʔ no~ura kiɾaŋ ko~u tiɾo~uʔ no~u mako~u.
S.FORM: I kalaeno^ nora kilang ko tilo^ no mako.
S.PHON: i kaɾaəno~uʔ no~ura kiɾaŋ ko~u tiɾo~uʔ no~u mako~u.
S.TRANSL: 我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
My trap is under that tree.

S.FORM: Nawiro maharate:ng ho^ iso?
S.PHON: nawiro~u maħaratə:ŋ ħo~uʔ iso~u?
S.FORM: Nawiro maharate:ng ho^ iso?
S.PHON: nawiro~u maħaratə:ŋ ħo~uʔ iso~u?

S.FORM: Ira ko nipatokawan no mako itini, ora ko sakafan' ako to tilo^ no mako.
S.PHON: ira ko~u nipato~ukawan no~u mako~u itini, o~ura ko~u sakafanʡ ako~u to~u tiɾo~uʔ no~u mako~u.
S.FORM: Ira ko nipatokawan no mako itini, ora ko sakafan' ako to tilo^ no mako.
S.PHON: ira ko~u nipato~ukawan no~u mako~u itini, o~ura ko~u sakafanʡ ako~u to~u tiɾo~uʔ no~u mako~u.
S.TRANSL: 我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

S.FORM: O rakar kinian, telien i 'alo^, o sapilepel to foting.
S.PHON: o~u rakar kinian, təɾiən i ʡaɾo~uʔ, o~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u fo~utiŋ.
S.FORM: O rakar kinian, telien i 'alo^, o sapilepel to foting.
S.PHON: o~u rakar kinian, təɾiən i ʡaɾo~uʔ, o~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u fo~utiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊用來捕魚。
This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

S.FORM: Awaay ko rakar i tamiyanan, o tiked ko sapilepel niyam to foting.
S.PHON: awaaj ko~u rakar i tamijanan, o~u tikəɬ~ɮ ko~u sapiɾəpəɾ nijam to~u fo~utiŋ.
S.FORM: Awaay ko rakar i tamiyanan, o tiked ko sapilepel niyam to foting.
S.PHON: awaaj ko~u rakar i tamijanan, o~u tikəɬ~ɮ ko~u sapiɾəpəɾ nijam to~u fo~utiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
We don't have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

S.FORM: Caay ka fana' kako a mipatiked, pasifana' hato kako haw?
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka fanaʡ kako~u a mipatikəɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡ ħato~u kako~u ħaw?
S.FORM: Caay ka fana' kako a mipatiked, pasifana' hato kako haw?
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka fanaʡ kako~u a mipatikəɬ~ɮ, pasifanaʡ ħato~u kako~u ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

S.FORM: Nga'ay to! Malahakelong kita a mipatiked anoci:la^.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u! maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ kita a mipatikəɬ~ɮ ano~uʦi:ɾaʔ.
S.FORM: Nga'ay to! Malahakelong kita a mipatiked anoci:la^.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u! maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ kita a mipatikəɬ~ɮ ano~uʦi:ɾaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
Sure! Let's go fishing together next time.

S.FORM: Ano cilimaw, pasifana'en ako kiso a misanga' to rakar.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦiɾimaw, pasifanaʡən ako~u kiso~u a misaŋaʡ to~u rakar.
S.FORM: Ano cilimaw, pasifana'en ako kiso a misanga' to rakar.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦiɾimaw, pasifanaʡən ako~u kiso~u a misaŋaʡ to~u rakar.
S.TRANSL: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

S.FORM: Mangangi^ ko tiked iso, alatek cimaalaay a foting! Tengtengen ari!
S.PHON: maŋaŋiʔ ko~u tikəɬ~ɮ iso~u, aɾatək ʦimaaɾaaj a fo~utiŋ! təŋtəŋən ari!
S.FORM: Mangangi^ ko tiked iso, alatek cimaalaay a foting! Tengtengen ari!
S.PHON: maŋaŋiʔ ko~u tikəɬ~ɮ iso~u, aɾatək ʦimaaɾaaj a fo~utiŋ! təŋtəŋən ari!
S.TRANSL: 你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來!
I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

S.FORM: Talaen ho^! Tada tata'ak ko nikangangi^ no lonan. Itini kako a mitengteng to tiked, katayra ho^ kiso iti:raw a miala^ to salil.
S.PHON: taɾaən ħo~uʔ! taɬ~ɮa tataʡak ko~u nikaŋaŋiʔ no~u ɾo~unan. itini kako~u a mitəŋtəŋ to~u tikəɬ~ɮ, katajra ħo~uʔ kiso~u iti:raw a miaɾaʔ to~u saɾiɾ.
S.FORM: Talaen ho^! Tada tata'ak ko nikangangi^ no lonan. Itini kako a mitengteng to tiked, katayra ho^ kiso iti:raw a miala^ to salil.
S.PHON: taɾaən ħo~uʔ! taɬ~ɮa tataʡak ko~u nikaŋaŋiʔ no~u ɾo~unan. itini kako~u a mitəŋtəŋ to~u tikəɬ~ɮ, katajra ħo~uʔ kiso~u iti:raw a miaɾaʔ to~u saɾiɾ.
S.TRANSL: 等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

S.FORM: Tata! Taloma' to kita, palada'en ita ko 'alomanay.
S.PHON: tata! taɾo~umaʡ to~u kita, paɾaɬ~ɮaʡən ita ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj.
S.FORM: Tata! Taloma' to kita, palada'en ita ko 'alomanay.
S.PHON: tata! taɾo~umaʡ to~u kita, paɾaɬ~ɮaʡən ita ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj.
S.TRANSL: 我們快回去和大家分享。
Let's go back immediately and share it with everyone.

S.FORM: Tayni^ to ko singsi^.
S.PHON: tajniʔ to~u ko~u siŋsiʔ.
S.FORM: Tayni^ to ko singsi^.
S.PHON: tajniʔ to~u ko~u siŋsiʔ.

S.FORM: Aka to pisalama^, kamaro' to i kamaro'an.
S.PHON: aka to~u pisaɾamaʔ, kamaro~uʡ to~u i kamaro~uʡan.
S.FORM: Aka to pisalama^, kamaro' to i kamaro'an.
S.PHON: aka to~u pisaɾamaʔ, kamaro~uʡ to~u i kamaro~uʡan.
S.TRANSL: 不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

S.FORM: Maanen aca, maapac to kako!
S.PHON: maanən aʦa, maapaʦ to~u kako~u!
S.FORM: Maanen aca, maapac to kako!
S.PHON: maanən aʦa, maapaʦ to~u kako~u!

S.FORM: Katahenay a talaloma'.
S.PHON: kataħənaj a taɾaɾo~umaʡ.
S.FORM: Katahenay a talaloma'.
S.PHON: kataħənaj a taɾaɾo~umaʡ.

S.FORM: Saka pina to no lipay i anini?
S.PHON: saka pina to~u no~u ɾipaj i anini?
S.FORM: Saka pina to no lipay i anini?
S.PHON: saka pina to~u no~u ɾipaj i anini?

S.FORM: Tinomaan i anini, o pipahanhan anocila^, mafolodaw kita a misalama^!
S.PHON: tino~umaan i anini, o~u pipaħanħan ano~uʦiɾaʔ, mafo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮaw kita a misaɾamaʔ!
S.FORM: Tinomaan i anini, o pipahanhan anocila^, mafolodaw kita a misalama^!
S.PHON: tino~umaan i anini, o~u pipaħanħan ano~uʦiɾaʔ, mafo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮaw kita a misaɾamaʔ!
S.TRANSL: 今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
It's Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let's go out and play together!

S.FORM: hayda! talalawac no 'alo^ kita.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! taɾaɾawaʦ no~u ʡaɾo~uʔ kita.
S.FORM: hayda! talalawac no 'alo^ kita.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! taɾaɾawaʦ no~u ʡaɾo~uʔ kita.
S.TRANSL: Great! Let's go to the riverside.

S.FORM: Saka pina no lipay i anocila^?
S.PHON: saka pina no~u ɾipaj i ano~uʦiɾaʔ?
S.FORM: Saka pina no lipay i anocila^?
S.PHON: saka pina no~u ɾipaj i ano~uʦiɾaʔ?
S.TRANSL: What day will it be tomorrow?

S.FORM: Tinoloan i anocila^, misalamaaaw kita to mali^ i herek no lahok anocila^.
S.PHON: tino~uɾo~uan i ano~uʦiɾaʔ, misaɾamaaaw kita to~u maɾiʔ i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk ano~uʦiɾaʔ.
S.FORM: Tinoloan i anocila^, misalamaaaw kita to mali^ i herek no lahok anocila^.
S.PHON: tino~uɾo~uan i ano~uʦiɾaʔ, misaɾamaaaw kita to~u maɾiʔ i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk ano~uʦiɾaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧。
Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let's go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

S.FORM: Nimaan kiso anodafak?
S.PHON: nimaan kiso~u ano~uɬ~ɮafak?
S.FORM: Nimaan kiso anodafak?
S.PHON: nimaan kiso~u ano~uɬ~ɮafak?
S.TRANSL: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

S.FORM: Tinopangan i anocila^, talakiyukay kako ato ci ina^.
S.PHON: tino~upaŋan i ano~uʦiɾaʔ, taɾakijukaj kako~u ato~u ʦi inaʔ.
S.FORM: Tinopangan i anocila^, talakiyokay kako ato ci ina^.
S.PHON: tino~upaŋan i ano~uʦiɾaʔ, taɾakijo~ukaj kako~u ato~u ʦi inaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

S.FORM: Mamaan kiso?
S.PHON: mamaan kiso~u?
S.FORM: Mamaan kiso?
S.PHON: mamaan kiso~u?

S.FORM: Mangalay kako a mota', talakamisi'an ho kako.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj kako~u a mo~utaʡ, taɾakamisiʡan ħo~u kako~u.
S.FORM: Mangalay kako a mota', talakamisi'an ho kako.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj kako~u a mo~utaʡ, taɾakamisiʡan ħo~u kako~u.
S.TRANSL: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

S.FORM: Masinawar kako.
S.PHON: masinawar kako~u.
S.FORM: Masinawar kako.
S.PHON: masinawar kako~u.

S.FORM: Tihemoken a pahanhan kiso.
S.PHON: tiħəmo~ukən a paħanħan kiso~u.
S.FORM: Tihemoken a pahanhan kiso.
S.PHON: tiħəmo~ukən a paħanħan kiso~u.

S.FORM: Singsi^, adada^ ko tiyad ako, talakatomayi'an ho kako.
S.PHON: siŋsiʔ, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʔ ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ ako~u, taɾakato~umajiʡan ħo~u kako~u.
S.FORM: Singsi^, adada^ ko tiyad ako, talakatomayi'an ho kako.
S.PHON: siŋsiʔ, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʔ ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ ako~u, taɾakato~umajiʡan ħo~u kako~u.
S.TRANSL: 老師，我肚子痛，我要先去廁所。
Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

S.FORM: Hayda, katahenay.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, kataħənaj.
S.FORM: Hayda, katahenay.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, kataħənaj.

S.FORM: Manga'ay kako a monanaw haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj kako~u a mo~unanaw ħaw?
S.FORM: Manga'ay kako a monanaw haw?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj kako~u a mo~unanaw ħaw?
S.TRANSL: May I go wash my hands?

S.FORM: Mangata^ to mipahanhan, nahoni to a tayra.
S.PHON: maŋataʔ to~u mipaħanħan, naħo~uni to~u a tajra.
S.FORM: Mangata^ to mipahanhan, nahoni to a tayra.

S.TRANSL: 運動會那天你會上場比賽嗎?
Will you compete in the sports day?

S.FORM: Hay, milifet to no mafekacay kako.
S.PHON: ħaj, miɾifət to~u no~u mafəkaʦaj kako~u.
S.FORM: Hay, milifet to no mafekacay kako.
S.PHON: ħaj, miɾifət to~u no~u mafəkaʦaj kako~u.

S.FORM: Milifet kiso i piondokayan a romi'ad haw?

S.PHON: miɾifət kiso~u i pio~unɬ~ɮo~ukajan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 運動會那天你會上場比賽嗎?
Will you compete in the sports day?

S.FORM: Milifet to no mimokonay to mali^ kako.
S.PHON: miɾifət to~u no~u mimo~uko~unaj to~u maɾiʔ kako~u.
S.FORM: Milifet to no mimokonay to mali^ kako.

S.FORM: Nimaan kita i piondokayan a romi'ad?
S.PHON: nimaan kita i pio~unɬ~ɮo~ukajan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ?
S.FORM: Nimaan kita i piondokayan a romi'ad?
S.PHON: nimaan kita i pio~unɬ~ɮo~ukajan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: 我們運動會那天要做甚麼?
What will we do in the sports day?

S.FORM: Malalifet to no masasitengtengay kita.
S.PHON: maɾaɾifət to~u no~u masasitəŋtəŋaj kita.
S.FORM: Malalifet to no masasitengtengay kita.
S.PHON: maɾaɾifət to~u no~u masasitəŋtəŋaj kita.
S.TRANSL: We will compete in tug of war.

S.FORM: Mipacakay to kakaenen i piondokayan kita haw?
S.PHON: mipaʦakaj to~u kakaənən i pio~unɬ~ɮo~ukajan kita ħaw?
S.FORM: Mipacakay to kakaenen i piondokayan kita haw?
S.PHON: mipaʦakaj to~u kakaənən i pio~unɬ~ɮo~ukajan kita ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 我們運動會要賣食物嗎?
Will we sell food at the sports day?

S.FORM: Aka, mipacakay to mali^ kita.
S.PHON: aka, mipaʦakaj to~u maɾiʔ kita.
S.FORM: Aka, mipacakay to mali^ kita.
S.PHON: aka, mipaʦakaj to~u maɾiʔ kita.

S.FORM: Pakaala^ to sakacecay kiso, tada ka'irayan!
S.PHON: pakaaɾaʔ to~u sakaʦəʦaj kiso~u, taɬ~ɮa kaʡirajan!
S.FORM: Pakaala^ to sakacecay kiso, tada ka'irayan!
S.PHON: pakaaɾaʔ to~u sakaʦəʦaj kiso~u, taɬ~ɮa kaʡirajan!
S.TRANSL: 你獲得了第一名耶，真是值得炫耀！
Congratulations on getting first place! You're amazing!

S.FORM: Aray.
S.PHON: araj.
S.FORM: Aray.
S.PHON: araj.

S.FORM: Ira i loma' ci ama haw?
S.PHON: ira i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ama ħaw?
S.FORM: Ira i loma' ci ama haw?
S.PHON: ira i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ama ħaw?

S.FORM: Hay, ira i kafoti'an a mafoti' ciira.
S.PHON: ħaj, ira i kafo~utiʡan a mafo~utiʡ ʦiira.
S.FORM: Hay, ira i kafoti'an a mafoti' ciira.
S.PHON: ħaj, ira i kafo~utiʡan a mafo~utiʡ ʦiira.
S.TRANSL: Yes, she's sleeping in her room.

S.FORM: Ira i loma' ci ama haw?
S.PHON: ira i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ama ħaw?
S.FORM: Ira i loma' ci ama haw?
S.PHON: ira i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ama ħaw?

S.FORM: Awaay, sadak saho, anodadaya^ to a taloma' ciira.
S.PHON: awaaj, saɬ~ɮak saħo~u, ano~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaʔ to~u a taɾo~umaʡ ʦiira.
S.FORM: Awaay, sadak saho, anodadaya^ to a taloma' ciira.
S.PHON: awaaj, saɬ~ɮak saħo~u, ano~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaʔ to~u a taɾo~umaʡ ʦiira.
S.TRANSL: 不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
No, she's not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

S.FORM: Ira i loma' ci akong haw?
S.PHON: ira i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ako~uŋ ħaw?
S.FORM: Ira i loma' ci akong haw?
S.PHON: ira i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ako~uŋ ħaw?

S.FORM: I sakatosa^ a tongroh ciira, kacakat kiso a mikilim.
S.PHON: i sakato~usaʔ a to~uŋro~uħ ʦiira, kaʦakat kiso~u a mikiɾim.
S.FORM: I sakatosa^ a tongroh ciira, kacakat kiso a mikilim.
S.PHON: i sakato~usaʔ a to~uŋro~uħ ʦiira, kaʦakat kiso~u a mikiɾim.
S.TRANSL: He's upstairs. You can go up and find him.

S.FORM: Ira ko i loma'ay haw?
S.PHON: ira ko~u i ɾo~umaʡaj ħaw?
S.FORM: Ira ko i loma'ay haw?
S.PHON: ira ko~u i ɾo~umaʡaj ħaw?

S.FORM: Ci Kacaw sa, halafin to caay ka'araw kiso, nga'ay kiso haw?
S.PHON: ʦi kaʦaw sa, ħaɾafin to~u ʦaaj kaʡaraw kiso~u, ŋaʡaj kiso~u ħaw?
S.FORM: Ci Kacaw sa, halafin to caay ka'araw kiso, nga'ay kiso haw?
S.PHON: ʦi kaʦaw sa, ħaɾafin to~u ʦaaj kaʡaraw kiso~u, ŋaʡaj kiso~u ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 是Kacaw喔，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
It's Kacaw. I haven't seen you in a while! How have you been?

S.FORM: Nga'ay to! tayniay kako a mikilim kisowan a malalicay.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u! tajniaj kako~u a mikiɾim kiso~uwan a maɾaɾiʦaj.
S.FORM: Nga'ay to! tayniay kako a mikilim kisowan a malalicay.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj to~u! tajniaj kako~u a mikiɾim kiso~uwan a maɾaɾiʦaj.
S.TRANSL: I'm doing great! I came to chat with you.

S.FORM: Icowa^ ci mama^ no miso?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaʔ ʦi mamaʔ no~u miso~u?
S.FORM: Icowa^ ci mama^ no miso?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaʔ ʦi mamaʔ no~u miso~u?

S.FORM: Mikeling to sinafel i sefi^ ciira, tahidangen ako haw.
S.PHON: mikəɾiŋ to~u sinafəɾ i səfiʔ ʦiira, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u ħaw.
S.FORM: Mikeling to sinafel i sefi^ ciira, tahidangen ako haw.
S.PHON: mikəɾiŋ to~u sinafəɾ i səfiʔ ʦiira, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
He's in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

S.FORM: Talacowa^ to ci Panay?
S.PHON: taɾaʦo~uwaʔ to~u ʦi panaj?
S.FORM: Talacowa^ to ci Panay?
S.PHON: taɾaʦo~uwaʔ to~u ʦi panaj?

S.FORM: Talatalokan ciira a milepel to 'ayam.
S.PHON: taɾataɾo~ukan ʦiira a miɾəpəɾ to~u ʡajam.
S.FORM: Talatalokan ciira a milepel to 'ayam.
S.PHON: taɾataɾo~ukan ʦiira a miɾəpəɾ to~u ʡajam.
S.TRANSL: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

S.FORM: Akong, taynian to kami.
S.PHON: ako~uŋ, tajnian to~u kami.
S.FORM: Akong, taynian to kami.
S.PHON: ako~uŋ, tajnian to~u kami.

S.FORM: Awaay i loma' ci akong, i pala^ ciira, talaen ho ko kafelec.
S.PHON: awaaj i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ako~uŋ, i paɾaʔ ʦiira, taɾaən ħo~u ko~u kafəɾəʦ.
S.FORM: Awaay i loma' ci akong, i pala^ ciira, talaen ho ko kafelec.
S.PHON: awaaj i ɾo~umaʡ ʦi ako~uŋ, i paɾaʔ ʦiira, taɾaən ħo~u ko~u kafəɾəʦ.
S.TRANSL: 你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
Your grandfather is not at home. He's in the field. Wait for him to come back.

S.FORM: Tayni^ to kiso faki^.
S.PHON: tajniʔ to~u kiso~u fakiʔ.
S.FORM: Tayni^ to kiso faki^.
S.PHON: tajniʔ to~u kiso~u fakiʔ.

S.FORM: Halafin to caay ka'araw, sofac sato kiso.
S.PHON: ħaɾafin to~u ʦaaj kaʡaraw, so~ufaʦ sato~u kiso~u.
S.FORM: Halafin to caay ka'araw, sofac sato kiso.
S.PHON: ħaɾafin to~u ʦaaj kaʡaraw, so~ufaʦ sato~u kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: I haven't seen you in a while. You've grown taller.

S.FORM: Lipahak ko faloco' a paka'araw a tayni^ kiso.
S.PHON: ɾipaħak ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a pakaʡaraw a tajniʔ kiso~u.
S.FORM: Lipahak ko faloco' a paka'araw a tayni^ kiso.
S.PHON: ɾipaħak ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a pakaʡaraw a tajniʔ kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: It's so good to see you.

S.FORM: O sapafeli^ i tamowanan kina talacay, i pin-syangen a pateli^.
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾiʔ i tamo~uwanan kina taɾaʦaj, i pin-sjaŋən a patəɾiʔ.
S.FORM: O sapafeli^ i tamowanan kina talacay, i pinsyangen a pateli^.
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾiʔ i tamo~uwanan kina taɾaʦaj, i pin-sjaŋən a patəɾiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
Here's a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

S.FORM: Halafin to cai ka tayni^ kiso, tahidangen ako caira tayni^ a malafi^.
S.PHON: ħaɾafin to~u ʦai ka tajniʔ kiso~u, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u ʦaira tajniʔ a maɾafiʔ.
S.FORM: Halafin to cai ka tayni^ kiso, tahidangen ako caira tayni^ a malafi^.
S.PHON: ħaɾafin to~u ʦai ka tajniʔ kiso~u, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u ʦaira tajniʔ a maɾafiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃晚餐。
It's been a while. Let's have a meal together.

S.FORM: Aka pisamaamaan aca, pauciya han kako, i palafangan kita a malalicay.
S.PHON: aka pisamaamaan aʦa, pauʦija ħan kako~u, i paɾafaŋan kita a maɾaɾiʦaj.
S.FORM: Aka pisamaamaan aca, paociya han kako, i palafangan kita a malalicay.
S.PHON: aka pisamaamaan aʦa, pao~uʦija ħan kako~u, i paɾafaŋan kita a maɾaɾiʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
No need to bother. I'll just have tea. Let's sit in the living room and chat.

S.FORM: Aray han ko pipaini^ no miso, taloma' to kako.
S.PHON: araj ħan ko~u pipainiʔ no~u miso~u, taɾo~umaʡ to~u kako~u.
S.FORM: Aray han ko pipaini^ no miso, taloma' to kako.
S.PHON: araj ħan ko~u pipainiʔ no~u miso~u, taɾo~umaʡ to~u kako~u.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

S.FORM: Herek saho a mipacok tina 'ayam, pataloma' hato, namo hato a micacak.
S.PHON: ħərək saħo~u a mipaʦo~uk tina ʡajam, pataɾo~umaʡ ħato~u, namo~u ħato~u a miʦaʦak.
S.FORM: Herek saho a mipacok tina 'ayam, pataloma' hato, namo hato a micacak.
S.PHON: ħərək saħo~u a mipaʦo~uk tina ʡajam, pataɾo~umaʡ ħato~u, namo~u ħato~u a miʦaʦak.
S.TRANSL: 這隻雞剛殺好，你們自己帶回去煮。
This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.

S.FORM: Herek no lahok kita a matatala^ i ancila^ haw?
S.PHON: ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk kita a matataɾaʔ i anʦiɾaʔ ħaw?
S.FORM: Herek no lahok kita a matatala^ i ancila^ haw?
S.PHON: ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk kita a matataɾaʔ i anʦiɾaʔ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Sera:我和您約明天下午好嗎?
Can I make an appointment with you tomorrow afternoon?

S.FORM: Hay, icowa^ kita a matatala^ a masaso'araw?
S.PHON: ħaj, iʦo~uwaʔ kita a matataɾaʔ a masaso~uʡaraw?
S.FORM: Hay, icowa^ kita a matatala^ a masaso'araw?
S.PHON: ħaj, iʦo~uwaʔ kita a matataɾaʔ a masaso~uʡaraw?

S.FORM: I picodadan kita a matatala^ haw? milu-in kita.
S.PHON: i piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan kita a matataɾaʔ ħaw? miɾu-in kita.
S.FORM: I picodadan kita a matatala^ haw? miloin kita.
S.PHON: i piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan kita a matataɾaʔ ħaw? miɾo~u-in kita.
S.TRANSL: Sera:我們約學校好嗎?我們要錄影。
How about meeting at school? We need to shoot a video.

S.FORM: tala soraratan aca, cilosid kako a tayraan.
S.PHON: taɾa so~uraratan aʦa, ʦiɾo~usiɬ~ɮ kako~u a tajraan.
S.FORM: tala soraratan aca, cilosid kako a tayraan.
S.PHON: taɾa so~uraratan aʦa, ʦiɾo~usiɬ~ɮ kako~u a tajraan.
S.TRANSL: Onak:那去聚會所好了，我會穿族服去。
Then let's go to the community center. I'll wear folk costume.

S.FORM: Makapah a macerak ko sakola no niyaro' niyam, tayni hato i kacerakan no hana^ a mikilim i takowanan!
S.PHON: makapaħ a maʦərak ko~u sako~uɾa no~u nijaro~uʡ nijam, tajni ħato~u i kaʦərakan no~u ħanaʔ a mikiɾim i tako~uwanan!
S.FORM: Makapah a macerak ko sakola no niyaro' niyam, tayni hato i kacerakan no hana^ a mikilim i takowanan!
S.PHON: makapaħ a maʦərak ko~u sako~uɾa no~u nijaro~uʡ nijam, tajni ħato~u i kaʦərakan no~u ħanaʔ a mikiɾim i tako~uwanan!
S.TRANSL: Sera:我們部落的櫻花盛開很漂亮。等花開的時候你來找我吧!
The cherry blossoms in our tribe are beautiful when they bloom. Come find me when the flowers bloom!

S.FORM: Talae:n aca i kacanglahan, tada halafin.
S.PHON: taɾaə:n aʦa i kaʦaŋɾaħan, taɬ~ɮa ħaɾafin.
S.FORM: Talae:n aca i kacanglahan, tada halafin.
S.PHON: taɾaə:n aʦa i kaʦaŋɾaħan, taɬ~ɮa ħaɾafin.
S.TRANSL: Onak:那要等到春天，太久了吧!
That would have to wait until spring. It's too late, isn't it?

S.FORM: Ano matira, piilisinan aca a tayni kiso.
S.PHON: ano~u matira, piiɾisinan aʦa a tajni kiso~u.
S.FORM: Ano matira, piilisinan aca a tayni kiso.
S.PHON: ano~u matira, piiɾisinan aʦa a tajni kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: Sera:那你豐年祭的時候來吧!
Then come during our Harvest Festival!

S.FORM: Hayda! mihamham kako!
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! miħamħam kako~u!
S.FORM: Hayda! mihamham kako!
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! miħamħam kako~u!
S.TRANSL: Alright! I'm looking forward to it!

S.FORM: Milicay ho, hacowa kiso a malinah a tala niyaro'?
S.PHON: miɾiʦaj ħo~u, ħaʦo~uwa kiso~u a maɾinaħ a taɾa nijaro~uʡ?
S.FORM: Milicay ho, hacowa kiso a malinah a tala niyaro'?
S.PHON: miɾiʦaj ħo~u, ħaʦo~uwa kiso~u a maɾinaħ a taɾa nijaro~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: Sera:請問你何時要搬回部落生活?
May I ask why you decided to move back to the tribe?

S.FORM: Malasingsi^ to kako ta taloma'.
S.PHON: maɾasiŋsiʔ to~u kako~u ta taɾo~umaʡ.
S.FORM: Malasingsi^ to kako ta taloma'.
S.PHON: maɾasiŋsiʔ to~u kako~u ta taɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: I want to return to teach at the local school.

S.FORM: Nawiro cai ka i tokay a malasingsi^?
S.PHON: nawiro~u ʦai ka i to~ukaj a maɾasiŋsiʔ?
S.FORM: Nawiro cai ka i tokay a malasingsi^?
S.PHON: nawiro~u ʦai ka i to~ukaj a maɾasiŋsiʔ?
S.TRANSL: Sera:為甚麼不在都市當老師?
Why not teach in the city?

S.FORM: Ma'ilol kako to niyaro', mangalay kako a paco'ay to niyaro' niyam.
S.PHON: maʡiɾo~uɾ kako~u to~u nijaro~uʡ, maŋaɾaj kako~u a paʦo~uʡaj to~u nijaro~uʡ nijam.
S.FORM: Ma'ilol kako to niyaro', mangalay kako a paco'ay to niyaro' niyam.
S.PHON: maʡiɾo~uɾ kako~u to~u nijaro~uʡ, maŋaɾaj kako~u a paʦo~uʡaj to~u nijaro~uʡ nijam.
S.TRANSL: Onak:因為我懷念我的故鄉，希望能回饋部落。
Because I miss my hometown and I also want to give back to the tribe.

S.FORM: Mafana' kiso a mitenoon, cima ko pasifana'ay kisowanan?
S.PHON: mafanaʡ kiso~u a mitəno~uo~un, ʦima ko~u pasifanaʡaj kiso~uwanan?
S.FORM: Mafana' kiso a mitenoon, cima ko pasifana'ay kisowanan?
S.PHON: mafanaʡ kiso~u a mitəno~uo~un, ʦima ko~u pasifanaʡaj kiso~uwanan?
S.TRANSL: Onak:你很會織布，是誰教你的?
You're very skilled at weaving, who taught you?

S.FORM: Ci ama ako, o mafana;'ay a mitenoon ciira i niyaro' no niyam.
S.PHON: ʦi ama ako~u, o~u mafana;ʡaj a mitəno~uo~un ʦiira i nijaro~uʡ no~u nijam.
S.FORM: Ci ama ako, o mafana;'ay a mitenoon ciira i niyaro' no niyam.
S.PHON: ʦi ama ako~u, o~u mafana;ʡaj a mitəno~uo~un ʦiira i nijaro~uʡ no~u nijam.
S.TRANSL: Sera:是我的奶奶，她是我們部落最會織布的人。
It was my grandmother, she is the most skilled weaver in our tribe.

S.FORM: Nawiro mangalay a minanam a mitenoon kiso?
S.PHON: nawiro~u maŋaɾaj a minanam a mitəno~uo~un kiso~u?
S.FORM: Nawiro mangalay a minanam a mitenoon kiso?
S.PHON: nawiro~u maŋaɾaj a minanam a mitəno~uo~un kiso~u?
S.TRANSL: How did you develop an interest in learning weaving?

S.FORM: O serangawan no mita ko tenoon, mangalay kako a misarayray to serangawan.
S.PHON: o~u səraŋawan no~u mita ko~u təno~uo~un, maŋaɾaj kako~u a misarajraj to~u səraŋawan.
S.FORM: O serangawan no mita ko tenoon, mangalay kako a misarayray to serangawan.
S.PHON: o~u səraŋawan no~u mita ko~u təno~uo~un, maŋaɾaj kako~u a misarajraj to~u səraŋawan.
S.TRANSL: Sera:織布是我們的文化，我想要讓文化延續。
Weaving is a part of our culture, and I want to ensure its continuity.

S.FORM: kaeso' 'inipen kina eraw.
S.PHON: kaəso~uʡ ʡinipən kina əraw.
S.FORM: kaeso' 'inipen kina eraw.
S.PHON: kaəso~uʡ ʡinipən kina əraw.

S.FORM: Nisaerawan no mako yo!
S.PHON: nisaərawan no~u mako~u jo~u!
S.FORM: Nisaerawan no mako yo!
S.PHON: nisaərawan no~u mako~u jo~u!

S.FORM: Watah ko fana' iso, halafin a misaeraw haw?
S.PHON: wataħ ko~u fanaʡ iso~u, ħaɾafin a misaəraw ħaw?
S.FORM: Watah ko fana' iso, halafin a misaeraw haw?
S.PHON: wataħ ko~u fanaʡ iso~u, ħaɾafin a misaəraw ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Onak:你真厲害，這要釀很久嗎?
You're really talented. Does it take a long time to make?

S.FORM: Cai, cecay a lipay maherek to, cacaken ho ko hakhak ato hemay, ta diwadiw han a mipacamol to tomod, ta fa^cal to paroen i 'atomo.
S.PHON: ʦai, ʦəʦaj a ɾipaj maħərək to~u, ʦaʦakən ħo~u ko~u ħakħak ato~u ħəmaj, ta ɬ~ɮiwaɬ~ɮiw ħan a mipaʦamo~uɾ to~u to~umo~uɬ~ɮ, ta faʔʦaɾ to~u paro~uən i ʡato~umo~u.
S.FORM: Cai, cecay a lipay maherek to, cacaken ho ko hakhak ato hemay, ta diwadiw han a mipacamol to tomod, ta fa^cal to paroen i 'atomo.
S.PHON: ʦai, ʦəʦaj a ɾipaj maħərək to~u, ʦaʦakən ħo~u ko~u ħakħak ato~u ħəmaj, ta ɬ~ɮiwaɬ~ɮiw ħan a mipaʦamo~uɾ to~u to~umo~uɬ~ɮ, ta faʔʦaɾ to~u paro~uən i ʡato~umo~u.
S.TRANSL: Sera:不用，大約一周就好了。把糯米和白米先蒸熟，再加入麴粉一起拌勻，就可以裝到甕裡了。
No, it only takes about a week. After steaming the sticky rice and white rice, we mix it with yeast powder, and then it can be stored in a jar.

S.FORM: O maan ko nipacakayan iso?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u nipaʦakajan iso~u?
S.FORM: O maan ko nipacakayan iso?
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u nipaʦakajan iso~u?

S.FORM: Ira ko daydam ato lokiyo, o nipalomaan no mako a maemin.
S.PHON: ira ko~u ɬ~ɮajɬ~ɮam ato~u ɾo~ukijo~u, o~u nipaɾo~umaan no~u mako~u a maəmin.
S.FORM: Ira ko daydam ato lokiyo, o nipalomaan no mako a maemin.
S.PHON: ira ko~u ɬ~ɮajɬ~ɮam ato~u ɾo~ukijo~u, o~u nipaɾo~umaan no~u mako~u a maəmin.
S.TRANSL: Kamih:我這裡有辣椒和蕗蕎，都是我自己種的喔!
I have chili and lokiy, both grown by myself!

S.FORM: Ano hatosa^ han ako a micakay ri, pina^ ko 'aca^?
S.PHON: ano~u ħato~usaʔ ħan ako~u a miʦakaj ri, pinaʔ ko~u ʡaʦaʔ?
S.FORM: Ano hatosa^ han ako a micakay ri, pina^ ko 'aca^?
S.PHON: ano~u ħato~usaʔ ħan ako~u a miʦakaj ri, pinaʔ ko~u ʡaʦaʔ?

S.FORM: Tosa^ li'an ira ko lima^ polo' a mapolong.
S.PHON: to~usaʔ ɾiʡan ira ko~u ɾimaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ a mapo~uɾo~uŋ.
S.FORM: Tosa^ li'an ira ko lima^ polo' a mapolong.
S.PHON: to~usaʔ ɾiʡan ira ko~u ɾimaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ a mapo~uɾo~uŋ.

S.FORM: Maolah kako kina fodoy, pina^ ko 'aca^?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħ kako~u kina fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj, pinaʔ ko~u ʡaʦaʔ?
S.FORM: Maolah kako kina fodoy, pina^ ko 'aca^?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħ kako~u kina fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj, pinaʔ ko~u ʡaʦaʔ?
S.TRANSL: Piyaw:我喜歡這件衣服，多少錢?
I like this piece of clothing. How much is it?

S.FORM: Lima^ li'an kinian.
S.PHON: ɾimaʔ ɾiʡan kinian.
S.FORM: Lima^ li'an kinian.
S.PHON: ɾimaʔ ɾiʡan kinian.

S.FORM: Watah ka'atekes, keroren to mamang rey?
S.PHON: wataħ kaʡatəkəs, kəro~urən to~u mamaŋ rəj?
S.FORM: Watah ka'atekes, keroren to mamang rey?
S.PHON: wataħ kaʡatəkəs, kəro~urən to~u mamaŋ rəj?
S.TRANSL: It's too expensive. Can't you lower the price a bit?

S.FORM: Tatiih, ano keroren haca, awa ko lifon no mako.
S.PHON: tatiiħ, ano~u kəro~urən ħaʦa, awa ko~u ɾifo~un no~u mako~u.
S.FORM: Tatiih, ano keroren haca, awa ko lifon no mako.
S.PHON: tatiiħ, ano~u kəro~urən ħaʦa, awa ko~u ɾifo~un no~u mako~u.
S.TRANSL: No, if I lower it further, I'll lose money.

S.FORM: Hayda, yana kohetingay a fodoy to cecay han ako.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, jana ko~uħətiŋaj a fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj to~u ʦəʦaj ħan ako~u.
S.FORM: Hayda, yana kohetingay a fodoy to cecay han ako.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, jana ko~uħətiŋaj a fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj to~u ʦəʦaj ħan ako~u.
S.TRANSL: Piyaw:好吧!那我要一件黑色的衣服。
Alright then, I'll take a black piece of clothing.

S.FORM: Nianay a po'ot ato sioy han ako.
S.PHON: nianaj a po~uʡo~ut ato~u sio~uj ħan ako~u.
S.FORM: Nianay a po'ot ato sioy han ako.
S.PHON: nianaj a po~uʡo~ut ato~u sio~uj ħan ako~u.
S.TRANSL: Piyaw:我要這把刀和這個鍋子。
I want this knife and this pot.

S.FORM: Tosa^ patek pida^ a mapolong, nakamayan no mako kinian, mihusyu kako caay kalales.
S.PHON: to~usaʔ patək piɬ~ɮaʔ a mapo~uɾo~uŋ, nakamajan no~u mako~u kinian, miħusju kako~u ʦaaj kaɾaɾəs.
S.FORM: Tosa^ patek pida^ a mapolong, nakamayan no mako kinian, mihosyo kako caay kalales.
S.PHON: to~usaʔ patək piɬ~ɮaʔ a mapo~uɾo~uŋ, nakamajan no~u mako~u kinian, miħo~usjo~u kako~u ʦaaj kaɾaɾəs.
S.TRANSL: Kamih:總共2000元，這是我自己手工打造的，保證可以用很久。
It's a total of 2000 dollars. I handmade these, and they are guaranteed to last a long time.

S.FORM: Painien ako ko hanghang a tayni micakay, maedeng kaemihen haca to mamang haw?
S.PHON: painiən ako~u ko~u ħaŋħaŋ a tajni miʦakaj, maəɬ~ɮəŋ kaəmiħən ħaʦa to~u mamaŋ ħaw?
S.FORM: Painien ako ko hanghang a tayni micakay, maedeng kaemihen haca to mamang haw?
S.PHON: painiən ako~u ko~u ħaŋħaŋ a tajni miʦakaj, maəɬ~ɮəŋ kaəmiħən ħaʦa to~u mamaŋ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Piyaw:我介紹朋友來買，可以再便宜一些嗎?
I'll introduce my friend to buy. Can you give a further discount?

S.FORM: Hayda, keroren ako to tosa^ polo' a pasintu.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, kəro~urən ako~u to~u to~usaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ a pasintu.
S.FORM: Hayda, keroren ako to tosa^ polo' a pasinto.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, kəro~urən ako~u to~u to~usaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ a pasinto~u.
S.TRANSL: Alright! I'll give you a 20% discount.

S.FORM: katayni a minengneng yo! ira ko nipacakayan to fodoy ato tamohong.
S.PHON: katajni a minəŋnəŋ jo~u! ira ko~u nipaʦakajan to~u fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj ato~u tamo~uħo~uŋ.
S.FORM: katayni a minengneng yo! ira ko nipacakayan to fodoy ato tamohong.
S.PHON: katajni a minəŋnəŋ jo~u! ira ko~u nipaʦakajan to~u fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj ato~u tamo~uħo~uŋ.
S.TRANSL: Piyaw:來看看喔!衣服帽子都有賣。
Come and take a look! We sell clothes and hats.

S.FORM: Pina ko 'aca^ no fodoy?
S.PHON: pina ko~u ʡaʦaʔ no~u fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj?
S.FORM: Pina ko 'aca^ no fodoy?
S.PHON: pina ko~u ʡaʦaʔ no~u fo~uɬ~ɮo~uj?

S.FORM: Tolo^ li'an ira ko lima^ polo' pida^ ko cecay a fafodoyan, cecay patek pida^ ko tolo^.
S.PHON: to~uɾo~uʔ ɾiʡan ira ko~u ɾimaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ piɬ~ɮaʔ ko~u ʦəʦaj a fafo~uɬ~ɮo~ujan, ʦəʦaj patək piɬ~ɮaʔ ko~u to~uɾo~uʔ.
S.FORM: Tolo^ li'an ira ko lima^ polo' pida^ ko cecay a fafodoyan, cecay patek pida^ ko tolo^.
S.PHON: to~uɾo~uʔ ɾiʡan ira ko~u ɾimaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ piɬ~ɮaʔ ko~u ʦəʦaj a fafo~uɬ~ɮo~ujan, ʦəʦaj patək piɬ~ɮaʔ ko~u to~uɾo~uʔ.
S.TRANSL: One piece of clothing is 350 dollars, three pieces for 1000 dollars.

S.FORM: Cecayen aca^ ako a micakay, ka o faelohay ko pafelien kako.
S.PHON: ʦəʦajən aʦaʔ ako~u a miʦakaj, ka o~u faəɾo~uħaj ko~u pafəɾiən kako~u.
S.FORM: Cecayen aca^ ako a micakay, ka o faelohay ko pafelien kako.
S.PHON: ʦəʦajən aʦaʔ ako~u a miʦakaj, ka o~u faəɾo~uħaj ko~u pafəɾiən kako~u.
S.TRANSL: Kamih:我買一件就好，請給我新的。
I'll just buy one piece, please give me a new one.

S.FORM: Nga'ay ho, mangalay kako a micakay to hakhak ato siraw.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ħo~u, maŋaɾaj kako~u a miʦakaj to~u ħakħak ato~u siraw.
S.FORM: Nga'ay ho, mangalay kako a micakay to hakhak ato siraw.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ħo~u, maŋaɾaj kako~u a miʦakaj to~u ħakħak ato~u siraw.
S.TRANSL: Kamih:你好，我想要買糯米飯和鹹豬肉。
Hello, I would like to buy sticky rice and braised pork with maqaw pepper.

S.FORM: Ma'emin to a mapacakay ko hakhak, ira ho ko nisaepangan to tana', mangalay kiso a micakay haw?
S.PHON: maʡəmin to~u a mapaʦakaj ko~u ħakħak, ira ħo~u ko~u nisaəpaŋan to~u tanaʡ, maŋaɾaj kiso~u a miʦakaj ħaw?
S.FORM: Ma'emin to a mapacakay ko hakhak, ira ho ko nisaepangan to tana', mangalay kiso a micakay haw?
S.PHON: maʡəmin to~u a mapaʦakaj ko~u ħakħak, ira ħo~u ko~u nisaəpaŋan to~u tanaʡ, maŋaɾaj kiso~u a miʦakaj ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Piyaw:糯米飯賣完了。我還有刺蔥麵包，你要買嗎?
The rice is sold out. I have tana pancakes, would you like to buy them?

S.FORM: Hayda^, pafelien kako to cecay, cilacila to kako a micakay to hemay.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮaʔ, pafəɾiən kako~u to~u ʦəʦaj, ʦiɾaʦiɾa to~u kako~u a miʦakaj to~u ħəmaj.
S.FORM: Hayda^, pafelien kako to cecay, cilacila to kako a micakay to hemay.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮaʔ, pafəɾiən kako~u to~u ʦəʦaj, ʦiɾaʦiɾa to~u kako~u a miʦakaj to~u ħəmaj.
S.TRANSL: Kamih:好吧!請給我一份，我下次再來買飯。
Alright, please give me one. I'll come back next time to buy rice.

S.FORM: Hayda^, padangen ako kiso a miparo^ i tisakiay, lima^ polo' pida^ a hatini.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮaʔ, paɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u kiso~u a miparo~uʔ i tisakiaj, ɾimaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ piɬ~ɮaʔ a ħatini.
S.FORM: Hayda^, padangen ako kiso a miparo^ i tisakiay, lima^ polo' pida^ a hatini.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮaʔ, paɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u kiso~u a miparo~uʔ i tisakiaj, ɾimaʔ po~uɾo~uʡ piɬ~ɮaʔ a ħatini.
S.TRANSL: Piyaw:好，我幫你用袋子裝起來，這樣50元。
Okay, I'll pack it in a bag for you. That'll be 50 dollars.
